purpose: Homepage primary-counter visibility policy. Live-era formal records are automatically eligible from R-000000033 onward; this sidecar can also pin or override immutable record_id + record_sha256 pairs for homepage rendering without mutating append-only records.

default_for_unlisted_records.reason: Records before R-000000033 remain historical/technical unless pinned. Records from R-000000033 onward are homepage-eligible when they are formal non-test record types. Test, smoke, validation, and maintenance records remain audit/technical only.

homepage_visibility.reason: Go-live founding Guardian application and first formal homepage reception record. Later live-era formal non-test records are automatically eligible under auto_homepage_policy.
